name: 11L WD0.034 Val-Only + Int6 + Sliding Window
author: Silas Alberti
blurb: 11-layer GPT with GQA (NUM_KV_HEADS=4), decoupled weight decay (0.034) on Muon optimizer, int6 per-row quantization, fp16 embeddings, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation (stride=64). Trained on validation shard only (fineweb_val_*.bin). Non-record submission included as an aside.
notes: Val-only training (trains on fineweb_val_*.bin). Sliding window BPB with stride=64. Non-record submission — included as an aside to demonstrate val-only approach. bytes_total shown is from seed 1337; all seeds under 16MB (max: 15,772,817).
